Concepts6 Decisions5 Devlog8 Notes3 Symbols5 Links2

Generated Wikiwiki site

Wikiwiki Wiki

A generated, browseable wiki built from structured Wikiwiki records.

Start here

Browse the project knowledge without reading raw records.

Wikiwiki keeps JSONL and Markdown for agents, then generates this static site for humans. Links are plain HTML files, so the site works locally and on static hosts.

Latest

Recently Updated Records

Symbol high

registerSiteCommand

Registers wk site, which generates the human-facing static Wikiwiki frontend into wiki-site/.

symbol_766a4f0e-54ee-44cc-a9f3-62faac669612
Symbol high

renderSite

Builds and writes the generated wiki-site/ static HTML frontend from active Wikiwiki records.

symbol_a4be37e1-62ce-45b4-a7bf-0735943a0959
Devlog high

Implemented static human wiki site generation

Implemented static human wiki site generation

event_dddc9fc5-611a-4902-b27c-8ee455c6832a
Decision high

Generate a static HTML site for human wiki browsing

Add wk site as a separate static site generator that reads structured records, preserves wk render Markdown output, and writes a browsable wiki-site/ folder with .html links, navigation, subtle metadata, responsive CSS, and local search data.

siteuxdxhuman-wikistatic decision_92c5a4f4-121d-4146-bb7d-9e0c3f780574
Concept high

Human-facing static wiki site

Wikiwiki generates a first-class static HTML site for humans while preserving Markdown and JSONL artifacts for agents.

siteuxdxhuman-wiki concept_9014ffe0-3948-4333-b6c9-f02896f81f84
Concept high

Role-oriented human wiki compiler

Wikiwiki can compile structured records into UX and DX human wiki drafts for IDE agents to turn into polished prose.

compileuxdxagent-workflow concept_4e17c000-edc9-4895-9da1-85cde9756eab
